Risk: Broad setup helper grants remain idle but consented.
Impact: Production bridge could inherit provisioning-level power by accident.
Control: Record resting-state decision; disable/revoke/time-box broad setup grants when idle.

Risk: Stage 8D workflow proof still needs Adam visual polish review.
Impact: Automation or tabs may surface a workflow that is technically proven but still awkward to use.
Control: Use the Stage 8D proof read-back and findings register before Teams tab expansion or new automation.

Impact: Support adapter testing could fail or drift into the wrong account lane.
Control: Complete MFA method for support@changeleadershiptools.com before mailbox adapter work.

Risk: Draft response is mistaken for sent response.
Impact: External communications could appear completed without human approval.
Control: Separate draft-created evidence from send-approved evidence in Agent Action Log.

Risk: Client or external records enter the bridge before ownership rules are reviewed.
Impact: Privacy, sharing, or delivery expectations may be wrong.
Control: Use internal dummy records only until Stage 8D findings and ownership rules are reviewed.

Risk: Permission grant lacks a tested revocation path.
Impact: Access cannot be paused quickly if behavior is wrong.
Control: Document revoke/disable path and evidence target before granting app permissions.

Risk: Action logs become too vague to audit.
Impact: Future UAOS/Graphify cannot prove what happened or why.
Control: Require source, classification, proposed action, approval state, result, and links.
